raw_consumer_statement:
Ive been a loyal Citibank customer for over 31 years. I disputed a charge from a company called XXXX due to deceptive business practices. The company used misleading advertising and charged me after I canceled. I never received the product or service as advertised. 
I contacted XXXX XXXX Department and spoke to a representative who told me Id be contacted by someone else to open a formal case and review the details. That follow-up never happened. I received no emails or calls despite checking multiple times. 
On XX/XX/year>, I received a certified letter from Citibank stating that my dispute was denied due to no response by XX/XX/year>. That is inaccurate. I was waiting for the promised follow-up. I never ignored any part of the processI was simply waiting on Citibank. 
I attempted to call Citibanks Dispute Department on the evening of XX/XX/year>. The wait time was listed as 15 minutes and never changed, even after an extended hold. At this point, I'm filing this complaint with CFPB because I have not been given a fair review or resolution. 
Im requesting that Citibank reopen my case and properly review the situation. I am willing to provide full documentation of both XXXX practices and my interactions with Citibank.
